\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
df = 8
x = np.arange(0, 20.1, 0.1)
tail_start = 15.51
y = chi2.pdf(x, df=df)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))
ax.plot(x, y, color='#00338D')
mask = x >= tail_start
ax.fill_between(x[mask], y[mask], color='#00338D', 
alpha=1.0)
ax.set_xlabel('x')
ax.set_ylabel('density')
plt.show()
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
